 {"id":"bd-r6a.3","title":"Create version-bump template as native Beads","description":"Migrate the version-bump workflow from YAML to a native Beads template:

1. Create epic with template label: Release {{version}}
2. Create child tasks for each step (update version files, changelog, commit, push, publish)
3. Set up dependencies between tasks
4. Add verification commands in task descriptions

This serves as both migration and validation of the new system.","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:43:40.694931-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.3","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:43:40.695392-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.3","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:44:03.311902-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"task"}
 {"id":"bd-r6a.4","title":"Add bd template list command","description":"Add a convenience command to list available templates:

bd template list

This is equivalent to 'bd list --label=template' but more discoverable.
Could also show variable placeholders found in each template.","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:43:47.525316-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.4","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:43:47.525743-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.4","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:44:03.474353-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"task"}
 {"id":"bd-r6a.5","title":"Update documentation for template system","description":"Update AGENTS.md and help text to document the new template system:

- How to create a template (epic + template label + child issues)
- How to define variables (just use {{name}} placeholders)
- How to instantiate (bd template instantiate)
- Migration from YAML workflows (if any users had custom ones)","status":"tombstone","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:43:55.461345-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.5","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:43:55.461763-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.5","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:44:03.632404-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-r6a.5","depends_on_id":"bd-r6a.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:44:03.788517-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"task"}
+{"id":"bd-r6tvq","title":"Session ended: gt-beads-refinery","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"event","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-11T06:47:07.13293-08:00","created_by":"beads/refinery","updated_at":"2026-01-11T06:47:07.179471-08:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T06:47:07.179471-08:00","close_reason":"auto-closed session cost wisp","ephemeral":true}
 {"id":"bd-r79z","title":"GH#245: Windows MCP subprocess timeout for git rev-parse","description":"User reports git detection timing out on Windows in MCP server, but CLI works fine.

Path: C:\Users\chris\Documents\DEV_R\quarto-cli
Error: Git repository detection timed out after 5s
Works fine in CLI: `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` succeeds

Hypothesis: subprocess.run() with asyncio.to_thread() may have Windows-specific issues or the MCP runtime environment may not have proper PATH/git access.

Potential fixes:
1. Add subprocess shell=True on Windows
2. Increase timeout further for Windows
3. Add better error logging to capture subprocess stderr
4. Skip git resolution entirely on timeout and just use provided path","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-07T16:31:37.531223-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-07T19:00:44.358543-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-07T19:00:44.358543-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-rb75","title":"Clean up merge conflict artifacts in .beads directory","description":"After resolving merge conflicts in .beads/beads.jsonl, leftover artifacts remain as untracked files:
- .beads/beads.base.jsonl
- .beads/beads.left.jsonl

These appear to be temporary files created during merge conflict resolution.

Options to fix:
1. Add these patterns to .beads/.gitignore automatically
2. Clean up these files after successful merge resolution
3. Document that users should delete them manually
4. Add a check in 'bd sync' or 'bd doctor' to detect and remove stale merge artifacts

Preferred solution: Add *.base.jsonl and *.left.jsonl patterns to .beads/.gitignore during 'bd init', and optionally clean them up automatically after successful import.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-06T19:09:16.114274-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-06T19:13:44.630402-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-06T19:13:44.630402-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-rbxi","title":"bd-hv01: Deletion tracking production readiness","description":"Epic to track all improvements and fixes needed to make the deletion tracking implementation ([deleted:bd-hv01]) production-ready.

The core 3-way merge algorithm is sound, but there are critical issues around atomicity, error handling, and edge cases that need to be addressed before this can be safely used in production.

Critical path (P1):
- Non-atomic snapshot operations
- Brittle JSON string comparison
- Silent partial deletion failures
- Race conditions in concurrent scenarios

Follow-up work (P2-P3):
- Test coverage for edge cases and multi-repo mode
- Performance optimizations
- Code refactoring and observability

Related commit: 708a81c","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-11-06T18:18:24.315646-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-08T03:12:04.15385-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-08T02:19:19.780741-08:00"}
